Case# TKSmartCardSlot.State.muteCard

iOS 9.0+iPadOS 9.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.10+tvOS 11.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
case muteCard
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKSmartCardSlot/State-swift.enum/muteCard#Discussion)

A Smart Card is inserted, but is mute, or does not provide responses to commands.
